query:
本轮发送context 和 状态栏不匹配； 每次打开新的codex窗口，状态栏是否没有准确读取 ？ 或者读错了/ 
如果两个codex 同时在vscode 打开，好像会有问题；

transcript.content: 我的合理的方式，不是扩大context window；先改回到258k； 不然无法测试 compat是否会发生；

Context(估算): 本轮发送context 71.6k，宿主context 71.6k；窗口总大小 258k，压缩比：0.0%（71.6k/71.6k），占总窗口比例：27.8%（71.6k/258k） 默认口径已经改回 `258k`。现在 VS Code helper 会先把宿主上报的 `model_context_window` clamp 到 `258000` 再算风险和 header，但同时保留原始上报值，避免把真实运行态丢掉。实现点在 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js:13) 和 [scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js:26)。 我也补了回归测试，覆盖“宿主报 `486000` 时默认仍按 `258000` 算”的场景，见 [test/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.test.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/test/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.test.js:285)。验证已过：`node --test test/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.test.js`，`4/4` 通过。当前实际 `npm run codex:vscode:gc --silent` 也已显示 `hostContextWindow=258000`、`hostReportedContextWindow=486400`，所以现在可以继续按你要的保守窗口去观察 `compat` 是否会发生。
本轮发送context 和 状态栏不匹配； 每次打开新的codex窗口，状态栏是否没有准确读取 ？ 或者读错了/ 如果两个codex 同时在vscode 打开，好像会有问题；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains VS Code context/status-bar mismatch and 258k context-window handling; no older resolved block should be dropped yet.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a direct follow-up on the same debugging thread as t1-t2. It depends on the prior raw context about reverting to 258k for compat testing and the assistant's explanation of the clamp/reporting behavior. No topic switch or closure occurred, and there are no older solved/off-topic turns to evict. Durable preferences can stay in raw form for now because this issue is still being actively debugged.

applied.archiveSummary: Active topic remains VS Code context/status-bar mismatch and 258k context-window handling; no older resolved block should be dropped yet.
applied.reasoningSummary: The latest user turn is a direct follow-up on the same debugging thread as t1-t2. No topic switch or closure occurred, and there are no older solved/off-topic turns to evict. Durable preferences can stay in raw form for now because this issue is still being actively debugged.
